items.label: Direction
items.description: Minimal direction wrapper for LTR and RTL layout previews.

items.label: Buttons
items.description: Multi-variant button with aurora glow, rose, neutral, ghost, and destructive styles. Inline-style gradients and box-shadow glows.

items.label: Button Group
items.description: Grouped action container for segmented command clusters and compact toolbar controls.

items.label: Badges
items.description: Small status and label badge component with Aurora tint variants.

items.label: Toggle Switch
items.description: Toggle switch with Aurora glow active state and smooth transition.

items.label: Toggle
items.description: Pressed-state toggle button for compact workbench controls.

items.label: Toggle Group
items.description: Single- or multi-select toggle cluster for segmented command choices.

items.label: Avatar
items.description: Circular avatar with gradient fallback initials and Aurora border styling.

items.label: Progress
items.description: Animated progress bar with Aurora accent-primary fill and panel track.

items.label: Spinner
items.description: Compact loading spinner with cyan, rose, and muted tones for asynchronous agent and registry work.

items.label: Separator
items.description: Horizontal or vertical separator using Aurora border tokens for grouped controls, menus, and dense metadata panels.

items.label: Toolbar
items.description: Dense workbench toolbar with grouped controls and separators for editors, previews, and inspectors.

items.label: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard shortcut keycap for command labels, menus, and dense workbench controls.

items.label: Inputs & Selects
items.description: Text input with Aurora focus glow, leading/trailing adornment slots, and control-surface background.

items.label: Input
items.description: Text input with Aurora focus glow, leading/trailing adornment slots, and control-surface background.

items.label: Field
items.description: Field wrapper for labels, descriptions, required markers, disabled state, and validation errors.

items.label: Label
items.description: Accessible form label matching Aurora control typography.

items.label: Input Group
items.description: Grouped input shell with shared focus treatment, addons, and companion grouped input helpers.

items.label: Input OTP
items.description: Segmented one-time-code input slots with Aurora control styling.

items.label: Native Select
items.description: Browser-native select with Aurora control styling, chevron affordance, and native select ref/event semantics.

items.label: Select
items.description: Radix select with Aurora panel dropdown, grouped options, separators, and keyboard navigation.

items.label: Combobox
items.description: Searchable selection control for large option sets like gateways, models, branches, and files.

items.label: Checkbox & Radio
items.description: Aurora-styled native checkbox with mixed-state support, focus glow, and label-friendly semantics.

items.label: Radio Group
items.description: Single-choice native radio group with Aurora focus glow and label-friendly semantics.

items.label: Slider
items.description: Range slider with Aurora accent track, glow thumb, and controlled or uncontrolled value support.

items.label: Number Input
items.description: Numeric stepper input with decrement and increment controls for tuning settings.

items.label: Textarea
items.description: Auto-resizing textarea with Aurora focus glow and control-surface background.

items.label: Calendar
items.description: Compact month calendar with Aurora focus, selected-day, and operator-friendly density.

items.label: Date Picker
items.description: Aurora date trigger with an inline month picker popover and selected-day glow.

items.label: Tabs & Pills
items.description: Underline-style tabs with Aurora accent-primary active indicator.

items.label: Alert
items.description: Inline contextual notice for forms, panels, docs, and permission flows.

items.label: Banners
items.description: Full-width status banners with info, success, warn, and error Aurora tint variants.

items.label: Callout
items.description: Inline contextual notice for forms, panels, docs, and permission flows.

items.label: Toasts
items.description: Floating toast notifications with Aurora panel surface, status icons, and auto-dismiss.

items.label: Sonner
items.description: Floating toast notifications with Aurora panel surface, status icons, and auto-dismiss.

items.label: Tooltip
items.description: Lightweight tooltip with Aurora panel-strong background and text-primary label.

items.label: Empty States
items.description: Centered empty state with icon slot, heading, description, and optional CTA button.

items.label: Skeleton
items.description: Shimmer skeleton loader with Aurora panel-medium base and hover-bg highlight.

items.label: Status Indicator
items.description: Live status label with muted Aurora tones for connected, syncing, degraded, offline, and error states.

items.label: Shimmer
items.description: Aurora-native shimmer parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: Confirmation
items.description: Aurora-native confirmation parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: Breadcrumb
items.description: Breadcrumb navigation with separator chevrons and Aurora muted text styling.

items.label: Pagination
items.description: Page navigation controls with Aurora neutral button style and active accent page indicator.

items.label: Command
items.description: Full-screen command palette with 72% alpha backdrop, centered 560px panel, magnifier search input with ⌘K shortcut hint, sectioned results (Recent, Actions, Skills, Navigate), keyboard shortcut kbd badges, arrow-key navigation, Enter to select, Escape to close, and a useCommandPalette hook that binds ⌘K globally.

items.label: Navigation Menu
items.description: Top-level navigation menu with active border and glow states.

items.label: Menubar
items.description: Horizontal application menu bar with compact Aurora menu items.

items.label: Stat Cards
items.description: Metric stat card with label, large value, trend indicator, and Aurora panel styling.

items.label: Tables
items.description: Primitive table parts with Aurora 8px table radius and dense headers.

items.label: Data Table
items.description: Sortable, paginated data table with Aurora panel headers, row hover states, and border-default separators.

items.label: Filter Bars
items.description: Horizontal filter toolbar with inline search, removable tags, and a clear-all action.

items.label: Timeline
items.description: Activity feed for agent runs, tool calls, deployments, and audit trails.

items.label: Description List
items.description: Dense key-value metadata layout for operational detail panels.

items.label: Search Results
items.description: Reusable grouped result list with active, empty, metadata, and keyboard-friendly option semantics.

items.label: Listbox
items.description: Shared Aurora listbox, group, and option row primitives for command palettes, search results, and combobox menus.

items.label: Marketplace
items.description: Starter marketplace/catalog page using the Aurora marketplace block.

items.label: Modal & Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog with Aurora panel-strong background, strong shadow, and backdrop blur.

items.label: Alert Dialog
items.description: Confirmation dialog built on the Aurora modal surface for destructive or high-friction decisions.

items.label: Accordion
items.description: Tokenized disclosure list for compact details, command output, and configuration sections.

items.label: Collapsible
items.description: Disclosure container for compact diagnostics and configuration details.

items.label: Dropdowns
items.description: Floating dropdown menu with Aurora panel-strong surface, hover-bg items, and keyboard navigation.

items.label: Context Menu
items.description: Right-click context menu with Aurora panel surface, icons, and keyboard shortcuts.

items.label: Popover
items.description: Lightweight anchored disclosure surface for inline details, previews, and quick editors.

items.label: Hover Card
items.description: Hover-triggered detail panel for source metadata and compact previews.

items.label: Sheet
items.description: Side and edge drawer built on Radix Dialog for inspectors, details panels, and mobile navigation.

items.label: Drawer
items.description: Side and edge drawer built on Radix Dialog for inspectors, details panels, and mobile navigation.

items.label: Share Dialog
items.description: Two-tab share/export dialog: Share tab with copy-link URL input, collaborator rows (avatar + name + role dropdown), and email invite form; Export tab with format radio group (HTML, PDF, PNG, Markdown), inline share chip, and a gradient download button.

items.label: Prompt Input
items.description: Full-featured AI prompt input with attach, slash commands, @mentions, model selector, send/stop buttons, attachment chips, and streaming state.

items.description: Aurora-native AI Elements parity block covering chat, code, voice, workflow, media, and utility surfaces.

items.label: Tool Calls
items.description: Condensed, grouped tool call display for AI sessions. Supports running shimmer, completed, and error states with collapsible arg/result panels.

items.label: Tool
items.description: Aurora-native tool parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: Thinking
items.description: Reasoning and chain-of-thought disclosure block. Three variants: thinking (streaming text), cot (numbered steps with connector), plan (step list with status icons).

items.description: Aurora-native chain of thought parity surface from AI Elements.

items.description: Aurora-native suggestion parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: Code Block
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code display with Aurora titlebar, copy button, optional line numbers, diff variant, and inline CodeChip export. Supports TypeScript, Rust, Bash, JSON, TOML, diff.

items.label: Artifact
items.description: Artifact panel with preview/code tab switcher, copy/download/expand toolbar, language badge, and streaming cursor. Three variants: panel (full-featured), card (compact collapsible in-chat), inline (bare code strip).

items.label: Terminal
items.description: Starter terminal workspace page using Aurora tokens, component styles, and the Aurora terminal block.

items.label: Permission Prompt
items.description: Three-variant permission prompt (modal, banner, inline) showing tool name, action description, target chip, Allow/Deny/Allow-always buttons. Danger mode adds red border, warning strip, and destructive copy.

items.label: Ask User Question
items.description: Assistant question block with radio, multi-select, or free-text input. Option cards feature hover accent-border glow and active-glow on selection. Supports optional code preview panel per option.

items.label: Permissions Config
items.description: LLM runtime permission config panel with master toggle, per-tool Allow/Ask/Block segmented controls, state badges, and scrollable tool list. Also exports PermissionChip for compact summary display.

items.label: Command Palette
items.description: Full-screen command palette with 72% alpha backdrop, centered 560px panel, magnifier search input with ⌘K shortcut hint, sectioned results (Recent, Actions, Skills, Navigate), keyboard shortcut kbd badges, arrow-key navigation, Enter to select, Escape to close, and a useCommandPalette hook that binds ⌘K globally.

items.description: Starter app shell page using the Aurora sidebar block.

items.description: Aurora-native agent parity surface from AI Elements.

items.description: Aurora-native graph edge label with status tone and direction states.

items.label: Attachment Chip
items.description: Six attachment UI variants: inline rose-tinted chip (with image thumbnail), media grid with hover overlay, tall doc/PDF card with file-type badge and page count, animated audio chip with 5 waveform bars, responsive upload progress tracker, and drag-and-drop zone.

items.label: AI Attachments
items.description: Aurora-native attachments parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: Sources
items.description: Aurora-native sources parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: Inline Citation
items.description: Aurora-native inline citation parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: File Picker
items.description: Modal file picker with sidebar navigation (Recent, Documents, Downloads, Project, Uploads), grid and list view modes, search bar, filter chips (All, Images, Documents, Code), drag-drop upload overlay, staged selection chips below the grid, and a multi-select confirm action using --font-sans for all file names.

items.label: File Tree
items.description: Recursive collapsible file tree with folder/file icons, hover and selected states, right-click context menu (new file, rename, delete, copy path), and an inline FileChip export for referencing files in prose.

items.label: Code Editor
items.description: Display-only code editor panel with title bar (filename, language badge, close button), line numbers, syntax highlighting, minimap column, diff mode (add/remove line backgrounds), error diagnostics (squiggly underlines, gutter icons, error panel), status bar, and a compact variant.

items.label: Code Workspace
items.description: IDE-style split-pane workspace combining a FileTree explorer rail (with Explorer header and right border) and a flush-embedded CodeEditor. Selecting a file node in the tree swaps the active file shown in the editor. Ships as one bordered container with no double border between rail and editor.

items.label: Web Preview
items.description: Browser chrome component with Aurora panel titlebar, three neutral square window dots, address bar with lock icon, reload and share icon buttons. Four variants: browser (full chrome), unfurl-card (link preview with favicon, title, description, domain chip), skeleton (shimmer loading), and error (failed to load).

items.label: Aspect Ratio
items.description: Fixed-ratio media wrapper for previews, charts, and embedded surfaces.

items.label: Card
items.description: Composed Aurora card shell with header, content, footer, title, and description slots.

items.label: Carousel
items.description: Horizontal scroll carousel with Aurora neutral controls for cards and media strips.

items.label: Chart
items.description: Small tokenized SVG chart surface for operational metrics and registry summaries.

items.label: Image
items.description: Aurora-native image parity surface from AI Elements.

items.label: Item
items.description: Reusable list item with icon, title, description, and action slot.

items.label: Resizable Panels
items.description: Two-pane resizable workbench layout for chat, editor, preview, logs, and inspectors.

items.label: Scroll Area
items.description: Tokenized scroll viewport with Aurora border and scrollbar behavior.

items.label: Login
items.description: Starter authentication page using the Aurora login block.

items.label: OAuth Flow
items.description: OAuth consent screen with app icon, scope checklist (sensitive scopes highlighted in warn color), and Allow/Deny buttons. Success/callback state with completion icon and close-window action. Token management table with token name, scopes chips, created date, last used, and Revoke button.

items.label: Error Pages
items.description: Operator-first error pages for 404 (Not found + requested path + Go home button), 403 (Access denied + contact link), and 500 (Internal error + incident ID + countdown ring with auto-retry). No consumer-app illustrations — uses ghost numeric backdrop instead.

items.label: Light Mode
items.description: Aurora CSS custom property token definitions for the full Aurora color, typography, shadow, and radius system.

items.description: Aurora-native action button for AI message affordances.

items.description: Aurora-native image candidate grid for AI generation review.

items.description: Aurora-native busy indicator for AI thinking and loading states.
